0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Consolidation in the posterobasal segments of the lower lobes of both lungs, more prominently on the left

2.text: Interlobular septal and interstitial thickening with honeycombing in the lower lobes of both lungs, more prominently on the left

3.text: Pleural and parenchymal scarring in both lungs, most prominently in the middle lobe of the right lung
